subcodes.first_line: Two matters there are: one being the Most Great Infallibility, and the other being the question of divine knowledge. All these are divided into two parts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دو مسئله است یکی عصمت کبری و یکی مسئله علم باری جمیع اینها بر دو قسم است
subcodes.subjects: @House of Justice, @infallibility; sinlessness ['ismat], @education of children; moral education, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
